case_title: GOLDENBERG, NESTOR VS DO, TINA UYEN DBA BEDROOM OUTLET

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDENBERG, NESTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DO, TINA UYEN DBA BEDROOM OUTLET $755.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $807.00, THE CONTRACT BETWEEN THE PLAINTIFF & DEFT IS HEREBY RESCINDED CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGEMENT. PLAINTIFF SHALL ALLOW DEFT TO PICK UP THE FOLLOWING PROPERTIES: ONE SIMONS QUEEN SIZE MATTRESS AND ONE QUEEN BUNKY BOARD BED PLATFORM WHITE 60" BY 82". STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $935.00 FILED BY GOLDENBERG, NESTOR AS TO DEFENDANT DO, TINA UYEN DBA BEDROOM OUTLET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DO, TINA UYEN DBA BEDROOM OUTLET
